message:
feat(cli): add config key completion and rename-prefix sync option

Extend CLI shell completions and sync functionality:

Completions:
- Add CompletionConfigIndex for config key and saved query completion
- config_key_completer: Complete config keys from all layers (default,
  user, project, db, env)
- config_key_assignment_completer: Suggest "key" and "key=" variants
- saved_query_completer: Complete saved query names from database
- Wire completers to config get/set/unset commands

Sync command:
- Add --rename-prefix flag to rename issues with wrong prefix during
  import (wires through to ImportConfig.rename_on_import)

This enables tab completion for:
  br config get <TAB>
  br config set <TAB>
  br list --query <TAB> (saved queries)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -926,7 +926,7 @@ fn execute_import(
     // Configure import
     let import_config = ImportConfig {
         skip_prefix_validation: args.force,
-        rename_on_import: false,
+        rename_on_import: args.rename_prefix,
         clear_duplicate_external_refs: false,
         orphan_mode,
         force_upsert: args.force,
